summary: Demo Mode feature fully tested. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Command Center DEMO button and Guardian Live Map with demo users verified. Demo scenario creates 3 users (Riya, Ananya, Neha) with guardian relationships to admin.

Backend_Demo_APIs.GET /api/demo/status (success): PASS - Returns running, current_step, total_steps, scenario_user, elapsed_seconds
Backend_Demo_APIs.Demo full scenario: PASS - Runs all 10 steps in ~30 seconds (session_start→location→risk_low→anomaly→risk_high→deviation→sos→notification→escalation→resolved)

Backend_Demo_User_Creation.Demo users created: PASS - Riya Sharma, Ananya Patel, Neha Verma created with demo emails
Backend_Demo_User_Creation.Guardian relationships: PASS - All 3 demo users linked to admin as 'demo_guardian'
Backend_Demo_User_Creation.GET /api/guardian/live/protected-users: PASS - Returns all 4 users (admin + 3 demo users)
Backend_Demo_User_Creation.GET /api/guardian/live/status/{riya_id}: PASS - Returns session history, risk info, past_sessions show CRITICAL risk from SOS

Frontend_Command_Center.data-testid='cc-demo-toggle': PASS - DEMO button in header (shows 'DEMO' text)
Frontend_Command_Center.data-testid='ai-risk-intelligence': PASS - Shows high risk users including Riya Sharma
Frontend_Command_Center.Header stats: PASS - ACTIVE SOS, AI ALERTS, GUARDIANS, INCIDENTS, UPTIME displayed

Frontend_Guardian_Live_Map.User selector pills: PASS - Shows 4 users (admin, Riya, Ananya, Neha)
Frontend_Guardian_Live_Map.Action buttons: PASS - Call, Message, Safety Ping, Alert buttons present
Frontend_Guardian_Live_Map.data-testid='intelligence-panel': PASS - Intelligence panel with AI Risk, Pattern, Action

critical_code_review_comments: Demo engine correctly creates users with proper guardian relationships (relationship_type='demo_guardian')
Demo scenario timeline executes all 10 steps including SOS trigger and command escalation
DEMO button in Command Center header correctly starts/stops demo via /api/demo/start and /api/demo/stop
Demo status bar (data-testid='demo-status-bar') shows progress during active demo
Guardian Live Map correctly displays demo users in user selector pills
Previous features (push status, device registration, notifications) still working
seed_data_creation: Demo mode creates: riya.demo@Nagarik.app, ananya.demo@Nagarik.app, neha.demo@Nagarik.app as demo users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Demo Mode feature complete. POST /api/demo/start starts 30-second scenario for Riya Sharma. Creates sessions, alerts, SOS events. Demo users (Riya, Ananya, Neha) appear in /api/guardian/live/protected-users and Guardian Live Map user pills. DEMO button in Command Center header (data-testid='cc-demo-toggle'). When active, shows demo-status-bar with step progress. Demo runs asyncio background task with 10 steps over ~30 seconds.
